mapper.select: SELECT id, role_name AS roleName FROM tb_role ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, role_name AS roleName, remark, status, permissions FROM tb_role WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, photo, status FROM tb_user u WHERE JSON_CONTAINS(roles, CAST(#{id} AS CHAR)) AND u.status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_role SET role_name=#{roleName}, remark=#{remark}, status=#{status}, permissions=#{permissions}, systemic=#{systemic}
